Rule:The member names in Legacy DACSES are stored in one field - T1043.nam in order of last, first, middle, and suffix.
Using commas and spaces as delimiters, extract the last, first, middle, and suffix.
For storing fulldisplay_name: move Last Name Suffix, First Name Middle Name ( insert comma ONLY after suffix - if no suffix then after last name, move space between last and first)

Rule:If State Code found in VREFM default to US, else spaces.

Move the first 3 numbers.
If there are only 2 numbers, insert a zero before the last number.
If there are no numbers, move zeroes.
If there are 3  numbers, and the last two digits are greater than 11,  move zero to the last 2 bytes.
Here are some actual Legacy DACSES examples:
N5'11 - this will be converted as 511(5 feet 11 inches)
6'2''    - this will be converted as 602 (6 feet 2 inches)
ERIFI  - this cannot be converted
6'185  - this will be converted as  600 (6 feet 0 inches)
